headline: Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Downtrend Continues After Poor Earnings
summary: Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE:BLDR) is one of the Best 52-Week Low Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE:BLDR) reported its Q1 earnings report on April 30. The market reacted negatively to the report, driven by a significant drop in earnings per share and profitability. The company reported revenue of $3.3 billion, […]
